title: Views
description: Membuat dan mengelola view (tabel virtual) di MySQL.

commands.name: CREATE VIEW
commands.title: Membuat View
commands.description: Membuat view (query tersimpan sebagai tabel virtual).
commands.syntax: CREATE [OR REPLACE] VIEW nama_view AS SELECT ...;

options.description: Pastikan INSERT/UPDATE melalui view memenuhi WHERE

commands.examples:
CREATE VIEW active_users AS
SELECT id, username, email, created_at
FROM users
WHERE is_active = TRUE;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW order_summary AS
SELECT u.username, COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total) AS total_spent
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id;

CREATE VIEW recent_orders AS
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
WITH CHECK OPTION;
commands.notes: View tidak menyimpan data — hanya menyimpan query.

commands.name: SELECT VIEW
commands.title: Menggunakan View

commands.name: DROP VIEW
commands.title: Menghapus View
commands.examples:
DROP VIEW active_users;
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS order_summary;

commands.name: SHOW VIEWS
commands.title: Tampilkan View
commands.examples:
SHOW FULL TABLES WHERE Table_type = 'VIEW';
SHOW CREATE VIEW active_users;
